assertions.name: identifies-as-software-project
assertions.check: Report classifies the project as a software/code project, not a content repository

assertions.name: covers-all-dimensions
assertions.check: Report covers all 11 dimensions: E1, E2, E3, E4, O1, O2, O3, O4, V1, V2, V3

assertions.name: detects-no-tests
assertions.check: Report identifies the absence of test infrastructure (no test runner, no test files)

assertions.name: detects-existing-telemetry
assertions.check: Report recognizes existing telemetry/analytics utilities in the project

assertions.name: generates-harness-directory
assertions.check: A .harness or scaffolding directory with generated scripts exists

assertions.name: scripts-relevant-to-typescript
assertions.check: Generated scripts reference npm, node, npx, tsx, bun, or TypeScript-specific tooling
